svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart LR
	A["Old Record"] --> D["diffRecords()"]
	B["New Record"] --> D
	D --> E{Match?}
	E -->|"M: 1"| F["No changes"]
	E -->|"M: 0"| G["V: changed field names"]
	G --> H["generateDiffDelta()"]
	H --> I["Delta object with new values"]
","style":"notebook"}
